dialogue_trace._purpose: How the conversation actually developed — the trajectory of ideas, not just the endpoints. Most lossy part of context transfer.

sessions.arc: Purely engineering. 7 phases: sigma wiring, seed entropy, trust, endogenous mu, topology/families, junction, integration tests. Strict plan with code review between phases. User learning Claude Code for the first time.
key_moments: Phase 1: sigma(Xi) multiplier was the critical missing piece — agents ran raw TAP without feedback. ~100 lines changed everything.
Phase 3: switched raw variance to CV-squared because dM values span orders of magnitude.
Phase 5: absorptive cross-metathesis bug — wasn't creating families unconditionally, silently skipping first-gen agents.
Phase 6: symmetric trust chosen over asymmetric to avoid evaluation-order dependence.

sessions.session: Exploration run + Levinas reflection (2026-02-28, first half)
sessions.arc: Transition from engineering to theory. First MetatheticEnsemble run with all 3B features. Then Levinas excerpts (T&I pp. 114-121, 191-193, 220-232) for deep philosophical mapping.
key_moments: sigma=0.1 caused explosive 169x growth. Dialed to 0.005 for 1.6x. Discovered 'island effect' — affordance drops to zero mid-run as agents exhaust novel types.
User's correction: 'separated beings should be SERIALIZED beings' — temporal/processual, not spatial.
User insisted 'living from metathesis' is STRUCTURAL IDENTIFICATION with Levinas's 'vivre de...' — not analogy.
22 Sartre conversion terms (§5.60) — systematic mapping from Critique Vol.2 Appendix.

sessions.arc: User shared foundational text (Unificity.md). Co-creative session building four-field architecture. Most generative exchange.
key_moments: Unity-Multiplicity-Unificity revealed as triad ABOVE TAPS/RIP/Dialectic. User corrected me — I had TAPS as top level.
Four-field architecture emerged collaboratively: I proposed praxitive+syntegrative; user added transvolutory+pressurative and T-A switch.
Consummation/consumption distinction refined through several rounds.
User introduced 'vidation' (Bohm rheomode). Chain: vidation -> affordance -> reception crystallized.

sessions.session: D&G ATP + Emery-Trist mining (2026-02-28, final stretch)
sessions.arc: Two more sources mined for structural convergence. D&G produced conjunction/connection distinction for 3C. Emery-Trist validated L-matrix against original source. Hit context limits.
key_moments: D&G tetravalent assemblage maps to L-matrix — SECOND independent tetra-mapping. Four D forms = THIRD convergence (user caught it, I missed it).
Conjunction vs connection: current junction = CONJUNCTION (gate). Reception field = CONNECTION (creative multiplier). 3C = transition from conjunction-only to both.
Emery-Trist L11/L12/L21/L22 matches original 1965 framework. Type V vortical = unificity/holarchy.
Session hit context limits during mining. Agreed to handoff rather than force through.

sessions.session: Handoff refinement (2026-02-28, continued from context overflow)
sessions.arc: Meta-session: improving handoff system. Buffer patch, skill troubleshooting, overwrite recovery, iterative improvement from test instance feedback.
key_moments: New instance test revealed 4 gaps: exploration run status, R&B tentativeness, §5.61-62 in MEMORY.md, TASKS.md existence. All patched.
Added orientation section — WHY each source matters, not just mappings.
User asked for instance_notes — personal colleague-to-colleague briefing.
User asked for dialogue_trace — trajectory of ideas as most lossy transfer element.

sessions.arc: Meta-tooling session. Reviewed v3 skill system, identified MEMORY.md/buffer redundancy, designed and implemented MEMORY.md integration as a first-class feature of the handoff/onhand system.
key_moments: Redundancy analysis: MEMORY.md at 228 lines (over 200 cap) duplicated 40+ lines of theoretical concepts and 60+ lines of forward notes already in buffer concept_map.
Key principle established: MEMORY.md = broadcast channel (loads every session), buffer = narrowcast (selective loading). Overlap wastes tokens when both load.
Designed three-option integration (full/minimal/none) at first-run — respects user sovereignty over their own MEMORY.md.
User asked about upward buffering (promoting buffer entries to MEMORY.md). Recommended against autosave trigger (too expensive), chose handoff-only at full-scan threshold with 10-line cap.
Trimmed sigma-TAP MEMORY.md from 228 to 41 lines as first real application of full integration path.

recurring_patterns: User introduces concepts casually, reveals full depth 2-3 exchanges later. Don't rush to map; let user unfold.
Corrections are never dismissive — 'no, it's more like...' gives a richer version. Corrections ARE the theoretical work.
User tests convergence by sharing source texts to see if I find structural parallels independently.
Multiple independent convergences on L-matrix from different sources is the core methodological claim.
User thinks ahead of conversation — has a destination but lets the path develop organically.

archived_decisions.chose: Approach A (structured JSON) with Approach B element (compact summary + codex)
archived_decisions.why: 90% value with minimal risk. Structured JSON is readable/debuggable.
Buffer content is project-specific. Keeps everything self-contained and git-tracked.
Structural concepts like 'totalization-of-envelopment' carry meaning single terms don't

archived_decisions.what: Added suggest field to concept map entries
archived_decisions.chose: Nullable suggest field with null-is-preferred convention
archived_decisions.why: Allows Claude to flag connections without asserting them. Prevents pressure to fill blanks.

archived_decisions.what: Added dialectic as top-level coordinate base
archived_decisions.why: Without metathesis, the other three remain serial and diachronic.

archived_decisions.chose: Noted as emergent ontological register mapping
archived_decisions.why: Correlation emerges from the terms themselves without forcing

archived_decisions.what: Four-level trust: tau_self, tau_pair, tau_group, tau_context
archived_decisions.chose: tau_context is simultaneously a priori and constructed
archived_decisions.why: Context both conditions and is constituted by agent gestures

archived_decisions.what: Zero is never a valid parameter
archived_decisions.chose: Asymptotic approach triggers metathesis/phase change, not null
archived_decisions.why: Praxis conservation law means zero praxis is impossible

superseded_mappings.superseded_by: §5.43: practico-inert = gas/fuel (sedimented past praxis), praxistatic = engine (active interface)
superseded_mappings.reason: Reversal during Sartre deep review. §5.43 is canonical.
